title: Worker Handoff
description: Worker → main session result. Written by main session AFTER receiving the subagent's response.

summary.description: 1-3 sentence outcome description. Required by phase-completion contract.

filesChanged.description: Files touched. Either path strings or {path, action} objects.

validation.description: Evidence the deliverable works (test output, typecheck, manual check).

followUps.description: Open items / known gaps for next phase.

stages.description: Code-reviewer specific: mandatory two-stage report (规格符合性 + 代码质量).

spec.description: Stage 1: 规格符合性 — does the change match the spec/intent?

quality.description: Stage 2: 代码质量 — readability, safety, performance, tests.

notes.description: Append-only process records (research, drafts, intermediate findings). Not the final summary.

finalizedAt.description: Set by `session.cjs complete`. Presence means the standard fields are no longer Pending.
